fields.name: methodOfPayment
fields.description: Method of payment required when PaymentType equal BT (applicable only for reservation action).

fields.name: paymentReference
fields.description: payment refence that will be passed to provider in case "INVOICE" or "TRAVEL_ACCOUNT" method of payment

fields.name: paymentServiceProvider
fields.description: payment service provider details will be passed to provider in case "PAYMENT_SERVICE_PROVIDER" method of payment.
